---
title: "`codegen`"
subtitle: "IŌØżLA code generation"
---

Very small backend wrapper around the IŌØż’ĖÅLA printer.

This module intentionally stops at source generation. Compilation to NumPy is left to the
external IŌØż’ĖÅLA toolchain so the course can keep that boundary explicit.


## `emit_iheartla_scalar(name, expr, declarations)`

*No docstring.*


## `emit_iheartla_matrix(name, matrix, declarations)`

*No docstring.*
